creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-04-20 12:40:28 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    ports-mgmt/genplist  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Genplist automatically creates a static plist for a port by installing it
  into a temporary directory, and then examining the directory tree.  The
  process is based on the instructions for plist generation in the
  FreeBSD Porter's Handbook.
  
  WWW:    http://www.neuro.mcw.edu/~bacon/FreeBSD_MRI
  
  PR:             ports/111892
  Submitted by:   Jason Bacon bacon at smithers.neuro.mcw.edu
  Sponsord by:    addport
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +26 -0     ports/ports-mgmt/genplist/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/ports-mgmt/genplist/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/ports-mgmt/genplist/pkg-descr (new)
